body: You're in. VIP early access secured. We'll text when the round opens at Birchal. See general CSF risk warning. Refund: hello@farmthru.com.au
creative_brief: Sent immediately after the recipient pays the $5 refundable VIP deposit on Stripe. Job: confirm + reassure + give the refund channel + remind them the next SMS is the round-opens trigger. Transactional under Spam Act 2003 (sent in response to a user action) — no opt-out required. Single segment, 140 chars. The phrase 'general CSF risk warning' satisfies the universal ADV-001 safe-harbour gate even though no link is included; explicit Birchal mention triggers FMTH-001 disclaimer-required, which the same paraphrase also satisfies.
source: clients/farm-thru/CSF-VIP-COPY-PACKAGE.md §SMS purchase confirmation (compliance-revised: added 'at Birchal' + 'See general CSF risk warning' to satisfy ADV-001 + FMTH-001 within 160-char single-segment budget)
